title: FinancialImpactEstimate
description: Architecture contract for a financial impact estimate produced during authorized live engagement work and held in Peak's controlled engagement storage — NOT in this repository. Actual financial numbers may be used in live client work when authorized, evidence-linked, source-labeled, access-controlled, and human-reviewed. No FinancialImpactEstimate instances (and no real financial numbers) are committed to the repo. Do not invent ROI. This is a storage-agnostic shape, not a database migration.

engagement_id.description: The engagement this estimate belongs to.

related_finding_id.description: Identifier of the finding/recommendation this impact quantifies (e.g. a ControlGap, OperationalRisk, QuickWin, or Recommendation id in controlled storage).

amount_low.description: Low end of the estimated impact (in `currency`). Held only in controlled storage.

amount_high.description: High end of the estimated impact (in `currency`). Held only in controlled storage.

source_evidence_ids.description: EvidenceReference ids that support this estimate. Every real figure must trace to evidence.

verification_status.description: Whether the figure is reported (as told) or independently verified against data.

review_status.description: Governance review state of this estimate (canonical ReviewStatus).

impact_status.description: Financial-impact-specific status (FinancialImpactStatus). Agents may not reach verified or client_facing_approved.

client_facing_approved.description: True only after explicit human approval to share with the client. Never set automatically.
